title: Sina-Amare/promptamp
summary: ⚡ The prompt amplifier — open-source BYOK prompt enhancer for any input field on any site. Chrome · Firefox · Edge

title: rahulmahadik/AskSQL
summary: AI database chat for Node and the browser: ask in plain language, review the SQL, get answers. Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, DuckDB. Read-only AST guard, React UI, MCP server.

title: svasenkov/greedy-token
summary: Route dev tasks through tool (rg/jq - rust) → python → ollama (cheap llm) → RAG before escalating to Cursor (expencive llm)

title: victorh-silveira/aether-quantum-engine
summary: Motor quantitativo assíncrono para a Deriv: Deep Learning (TCN PyTorch) em Range Break, dimensionamento Kelly com martingale e gates de qualidade pós-treino.

title: wangzhe04/ruyi-workbench-oss
summary: 开源 Windows 本地 AI 工作台｜OpenAI-compatible + Claude CLI，99 个桌面/Office 工具，可回退文件操作与可视化多 Agent 工作流。

title: radif-ru/ai-multi-agent-system
summary: Локальная мульти-агентная система (Ollama). Мульти-канальность (Telegram/консоль/MAX), мульти-модельность (LLM/embed/vision/voice), мультимодальность (текст/PDF/фото/голос), мульти-агентность (Planner/Executor/Critic). Гибрид LLM и детерминированных инструментов: почта, Яндекс.Диск, web, OCR, скрипты. sqlite-vec RAG. ADR, CI. Без облачных API.

title: ricardozmt/claude-in-your-pocket
summary: OpenClaude 2026: AI Coding Agent in Your Pocket – No Server, No PC

title: dryvist/nix-ai
summary: Your AI coding toolkit, declared in Nix — Claude, Gemini, Copilot, 15+ MCP servers, one flake

title: MasihMoafi/Elpis
summary: You put an agent into an Elpis, and it becomes Elpis; Be Elpis my friend.

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: radiohd-rf/PromptEar
summary: Local audio/video transcription with AI text enhancement using faster-whisper + Ollama (Qwen 2.5). Windows desktop app.

title: obris-dev/openmagpie
summary: Open-source, self-hostable social listening.

title: netresearch/t3x-nr-llm
summary: The shared AI foundation for TYPO3 — one LLM setup for every extension on your site

title: backtest-kit/backtest-ollama-crontab
summary: A TypeScript monorepo demonstrating how to code Ollama outline-based risk filter, with a 15-minute crontab doing live and backtest both Telegram-channel ingestion. Parses signals from a public Telegram channel, asks the LLM whether each signal is safe to trade

title: open-multi-agent/open-multi-agent
summary: TypeScript AI agent orchestration framework with dynamic workflows. Describe the goal, not the graph: a coordinator plans the task DAG at runtime and runs it on any LLM (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, or local models).

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: mrchriscarpenter/sona
summary: A local-first voice assistant in Go with pluggable STT, TTS, and LLM providers.

title: Miosa-osa/OSA
summary: An AI agent that lives on your computer and does the work you ask for, in plain words — from writing code to running your business busywork. Local, one command, any model.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.
